prompt: The Shopify order ingress feature is complete. 12 files changed across apps/api and apps/admin — including 3 React components (OrderList.jsx, OrderDetail.jsx, OrderStats.jsx), 2 new service files, webhook handler, and migration. Contract has 31 postconditions across API (13), Service (9), UI (6), Cross-layer (3). Verify everything before the PR.

assertions.text: Ran verify.sh script (new skill) OR ran 7 manual checks (old skill)
All 7 checks present — check 4 (build) is NOT skipped since frontend files changed
Build verification runs vite build and pastes output
Postcondition trace covers all 4 layers (API, Service, UI, Cross-layer)
Import resolution checks both .js and .jsx files
Debug artifact check scans both api and admin
